name: Fujian SBS Zipper Science&Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Fujian SBS Zipper Science&Technology Co., Ltd researches, designs, develops, manufactures, and markets zippers under the SBS brand in China and internationally. The company offers nylon, plastic, metal, and coil zippers; snap and prong snap buttons, jeans buttons; and rivets, eyelets, sliders and pullers. It also provides precision molds, and metal and plastic pressing castings. The company also exports its products. Fujian SBS Zipper Science&Technology Co., Ltd was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Jinjiang, China.
